headline: Saturn's Dent-Proof Panels Couldn't Stop It From Being the Deadliest Car Per Crash in America
lastImprovement: 2026-03-13: Fixed social sharing meta tags across all 74 story pages. Upgraded twitter:card from 'summary' to 'summary_large_image' for 60 stories with images (enables large preview cards on Twitter/X). Added missing twitter:image tags to ~55 stories. Added missing og:image tags where needed. Removed duplicate twitter:card meta tags. Fixed broken og:image reference in sober-majority.html (pointed to non-existent image). Added complete favicon set (svg, 32px, 192px, apple-touch-icon) to all story pages for consistent branding.
